abilities.name: Aether Step
abilities.rulesText: Use your movement to teleport anywhere you can see.

abilities.name: Portal
abilities.rulesText: Once per turn, open a portal between two points in space that you can see. Anything that passes through one portal comes out of the other. The portal can be up to twice your size or as small as your hand. You can have multiple portals open, but all of your portals close if you take physical damage.

abilities.name: Aether Realm
abilities.rulesText: You are the master of a fragment of the aether, where you can store matter and imprison enemies. Banish the target into the aether. They can only escape by beating you in an INS vs. INS check.

abilities.name: Psychic Whisper

check.notes: Make this CHA check with advantage.

abilities.rulesText: Send your thoughts into the mind of a creature that you can see. Make a CHA check against them with advantage.

abilities.name: Psychic Echo
abilities.trigger: When you see an enemy fail an offensive skill check
abilities.rulesText: Deal 2 magic damage and the target gains disadvantage on their next skill check.

abilities.name: Mind Control
abilities.rulesText: Control one skill check on the target's next turn.

abilities.name: Aether Strike
abilities.rulesText: Deal X + STR magic damage.

abilities.name: Ravenous Rift
abilities.rulesText: When you hit an aether strike, your target must roll a STR check. If they score lower than your PRW bonus + your level, they take additional magic damage equal to your STR bonus.

abilities.name: Aether Prism
abilities.rulesText: Rather than unleashing a single aether strike, you may choose to make a number of separate attacks equal to the amount of MP you spend. Each attack deals 1 + STR magic damage.

abilities.name: Familiar
abilities.rulesText: You are accompanied by a small magical creature from an immortal realm. Your familiar is incorporeal, can speak and spy on your behalf, but can only affect the physical world when you feed it mana. You summon your familiar until the end of your next turn. Whenever you focus on an enemy, your familiar strikes them, dealing 2 physical damage.

abilities.name: Aetherial Arms
abilities.rulesText: You summon a magical blade, bow, or bludgeon into your hand. It deals 2 physical damage and 1 magic damage on a hit, and lasts until the end of your next turn.

abilities.name: Immortal Guardian
abilities.rulesText: You summon an elemental, infernal, celestial, or fae guardian to defend you until the end of your next turn. Whenever an enemy moves into your zone or makes an attack against you, your guardian deals 2 physical damage and 1 magic damage to it.

abilities.name: Fluid Matter
abilities.rulesText: Change any handheld item into a different item of the same mass and material composition. Or, INS vs. STR (one enemy you can see): liquefy the ground beneath the target's feet; the target gains disadvantage on STL checks and cannot move until they score at least 10 on a STR check to escape.

abilities.name: Morphic Lance

check.notes: Spend X MP to create X lances; make an attack for each lance.

abilities.rulesText: Spend X MP to create X morphic lances, then launch each one at an enemy you can see (INS vs. STL). Each hit deals 2 physical damage.

abilities.name: World Shaping
abilities.rulesText: INS vs. STR of every enemy you can see: push the target; they cannot move until the end of their next turn. You and every ally you can see may move immediately.

abilities.name: Stinging Venom
abilities.rulesText: Apply your venom to the target. Whenever they fail a skill check on their next turn, they take 2 magic damage.

abilities.name: Lifeblood Elixir
abilities.rulesText: Whenever a mortal creature dies within your reach, you can spend 1 MP to refine its lifeblood into a healing elixir. You can also spend 1 MP to create a lifeblood elixir from your own blood whenever you take 3 or more physical damage at once. You can consume one lifeblood elixir per turn, which restores 5 HP. Lifeblood elixirs expire after 24 hours.

abilities.name: Potion of Dreams
abilities.rulesText: Once per turn, you may spend 3 MP to brew a potion of dreams. You can make a free skill check when you consume a potion of dreams, but you take 5 magic damage if it fails. Potions of dreams expire after 24 hours.

abilities.name: Runes of Power
abilities.rulesText: Once per turn, infuse a weapon with magic. Whenever you deal damage with it, you can spend 1 MP to gain a point of focus on your target. The weapon deals bonus magic damage equal to your focus on the target.

abilities.name: Arcane Script
abilities.rulesText: Once per turn, while focusing on an enemy, spend 2 MP to imbue a weapon with arcane script. The weapon hovers alongside you (moving with you when you move). On each of your turns, it can make one free attack against an enemy you are focusing on. These attacks use your PRW bonus but do not add your STR bonus to the damage. If you lose focus, the weapon loses its enchantment.

abilities.name: Spirit Sigil
abilities.rulesText: Bind your spirit to a weapon. You can summon your bound weapon to your hand at any time (it flies to you from any distance, but cannot break through barriers). You do not lose all of your focus when you take damage; instead, you lose an amount of focus equal to the HP you lose. You can use your bound weapon to make melee attacks against targets in adjacent zones as if they were within your reach. You can only have one bound weapon at a time.

abilities.name: Alchemical Bomb
abilities.rulesText: Spend X MP to create a mana bomb. PRW vs. STL (every creature within a zone you can see). The bomb deals 1 magic damage per 2 MP spent.

abilities.name: Acid Flask

check.notes: Target: an enemy within three zones.

abilities.rulesText: Deal 2 physical damage. Attacks against the target have advantage until the end of your next turn.

abilities.name: Dragon Oil
abilities.rulesText: Flood a zone that you can see with burning oil. Any creature that starts its turn within the zone takes 3 magic damage. The oil burns until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: Spirit Binding
abilities.rulesText: If your target dies before the end of your next turn, they are raised as your undead servant with X HP. They retain their STR bonus but lose all other skill bonuses, and they cannot regain HP. You can make one skill check for them on each of your turns.

abilities.name: Reaper's Harvest

check.notes: Targets: every enemy whose spirit you have bound.

abilities.rulesText: You can consume the soul of an undead servant, regaining HP or MP equal to their remaining HP; they crumble to ash. Also: INS vs. CHA of every enemy whose spirit you have bound; the target takes 4 magic damage.

abilities.name: Undead Plague
abilities.rulesText: Whenever your undead servants deal damage to an enemy, they also bind the target's spirit until the end of your next turn. If that enemy dies while their soul is bound, they are raised as another undead servant with 3 HP.

abilities.name: Shadow Strike

check.notes: Requires a weapon attack; triggered when you have advantage.

abilities.rulesText: Deal Weapon + STR + STL physical damage.

abilities.name: Shadow Dancing
abilities.rulesText: When you dodge an attack, spend 2 MP to immediately make a free skill check.

abilities.name: Shadow Theft
abilities.rulesText: Steal the target's shadow. Creatures without shadows take +1 magic damage whenever they take damage. Your target can reclaim their shadow from you by dealing damage to you.

abilities.name: Bloodthirst
abilities.rulesText: When you make a physical attack, you may spend MP to gain a bonus to your PRW check. You gain +1 to the PRW check per MP that you spend.

abilities.name: Bloodletting
abilities.rulesText: Once per turn, you may expend up to 3 HP to restore an equal amount of MP.

abilities.name: Bloodbath
abilities.rulesText: Once per turn when you deal damage, regain 3 HP.

abilities.name: Curse of Dread

check.notes: Target must be able to hear you.

abilities.rulesText: The target is marked for death. The next time they take physical damage, they take an equal amount of magic damage as well.

abilities.name: Curse of Bloodshed
abilities.rulesText: Once per turn, curse a weapon. Its wielder can spend 2 HP to deal +3 physical damage when they hit an attack with it.

abilities.name: Curse of Agony

check.notes: Target must be able to hear you.

abilities.rulesText: Until the end of your next turn, the target takes magic damage equal to the damage it deals.
